name: orbit-cli
description: Plumbing-only OpenClaw plugin that wraps Orbit's HTTP API + claw-side fetchers. 22 verbs covering observations, persons, per-pass snapshots, active-since selection, meetings, topics, calendar/messages fetch (with since), jobs, and onboarding backfill. No LLM, no classification — transport only. Observer/resolver/brief/topic/backfill/combiner/delta-enricher SKILLs own all interpretation.
